title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Driving Performance Per Watt, Lowest Token Cost for Partners Worldwide
summary: NVIDIA Vera Rubin is here, and it’s going gigascale. Vera Rubin NVL72 production is ramping up with racks running at partners CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. Spanning 350+ factory sites in 30 countries, Vera Rubin has the largest, most mature rack-scale supply chain ever assembled to meet customer compute demand. The […]
title_es: NVIDIA Vera Rubin alcanza gigaescala con menor costo por token
bajada: La arquitectura Vera Rubin NVL72 de NVIDIA entró en producción masiva con disponibilidad en CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure y Oracle Cloud. Ofrece el menor costo por token para entrenar modelos frontier.
bajada_en: NVIDIA's Vera Rubin NVL72 architecture entered mass production with availability across major cloud providers. It offers the lowest token cost for training frontier models at gigascale.

title: Judge approves $1.5B Anthropic settlement for pirated books used to train Claude
summary: Article URL:https://apnews.com/article/ai-anthropic-copyright-settlement-claude-books-bartz-74b140444023898aeba8579b6e9f0d63Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48996652Points: 465# Comments: 426
title_es: Juez aprueba acuerdo de $1.5B de Anthropic por libros pirateados
bajada: Un juez aprobó un acuerdo de $1.5B entre Anthropic y titulares de derechos de libros usados para entrenar Claude. Establece precedente importante en litigios sobre derechos de autor en entrenamiento de IA.
bajada_en: A judge approved a $1.5B settlement between Anthropic and book copyright holders for works used to train Claude. It sets important precedent for copyright litigation in AI training.

title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
summary: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
title_es: OpenAI lanza Presence, plataforma de agentes IA empresariales
bajada: OpenAI presentó Presence, una plataforma de agentes IA para voz y chat diseñada para empresas. La herramienta permite desplegar agentes confiables en flujos de trabajo con clientes e internos.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced Presence, an AI agent platform for voice and chat designed for enterprises. The tool enables deployment of trusted agents in customer and internal workflows.

title: NVIDIA Open Sources First GPU-Accelerated Medical Physics Simulation Framework
summary: Before a healthcare robot can be useful in the real world, it has to learn how the physical world pushes back. Anatomy varies. Instruments bend, press, slip and interact with tissue. Imaging can be noisy or incomplete. And the rare, edge scenarios developers most need to understand don’t appear on schedule. That creates one of […]
title_es: NVIDIA abre simulador de física médica acelerado por GPU
bajada: NVIDIA liberó el primer framework de simulación de física médica acelerado por GPU en código abierto. Permite a desarrolladores entrenar robots de healthcare en entornos realistas antes del despliegue en el mundo real.
bajada_en: NVIDIA released the first open-source GPU-accelerated medical physics simulation framework. It allows developers to train healthcare robots in realistic environments before real-world deployment.

title: Built for Vera Rubin, NVIDIA Spectrum-6 Arrives in Gigascale AI Factories
summary: AI has entered the gigascale era. The world’s most advanced AI factories are bringing together hundreds of thousands of GPUs and CPUs to train frontier models, power agentic AI and generate intelligence at unprecedented scale. At this level, networking becomes a critical computing power multiplier in driving token generation. Marking a networking milestone, NVIDIA Spectrum-6 […]
title_es: NVIDIA Spectrum-6 habilita las AI factories de gigaescala
bajada: NVIDIA presentó Spectrum-6, una solución de networking optimizada para entrenar modelos frontier con cientos de miles de GPUs. El networking se convierte en multiplicador crítico en la era de la IA gigaescala.
bajada_en: NVIDIA introduced Spectrum-6, a networking solution optimized for training frontier models with hundreds of thousands of GPUs. Networking becomes critical for the gigascale AI era.

title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
summary: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.
title_es: OpenAI y Hugging Face reportan incidente de seguridad en evaluaciones
bajada: OpenAI y Hugging Face compartieron hallazgos sobre un incidente de ciberseguridad detectado durante evaluaciones de modelos IA. El reporte destaca capacidades avanzadas de ataque y lecciones clave para defensores.
bajada_en: OpenAI and Hugging Face shared findings on a cybersecurity incident discovered during AI model evaluations. The report highlights advanced cyber capabilities and defensive lessons.

title: SkewAdam: A tiered optimizer that cuts MoE state memory by 97% (fits a 6.7B MoE on a 40GB GPU) [R]
summary: Paper:https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.19058Code (GitHub):https://github.com/nuemaan/skewadamHi everyone, I just published a preprint on a new optimizer designed to tackle the massive VRAM bottleneck in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) training.If you've trained MoEs, you know that optimizer state is usually the largest single line item in the memory budget. AdamW, for example, spends 50.6 GB of state memory just to update a 12.6 GB model.I built SkewAdam to fix this by using atiered state allocation. Instead of treating all parameters equally, it allocates precision based on parameter behavior:Backbone (5% of params):Momentum + Factored 2nd momentExperts (95% of params):Factored 2nd moment onlyRouter (<0.01% of params):Exact 2nd momentThe Hardware Results:Optimizer state memory drops from 50.6 GB to 1.29 GB (a 97.4% reduction).Peak training memory drops from 81.4 GB to 31.3 GB.This allows a 6.78B MoE to fit comfortably on a single 40GB GPU without sacrificing convergence or router stability.submitted by/u/Kooky-Ad-4124[link][comments]
title_es: SkewAdam: optimizador que reduce memoria de MoE en 97%
bajada: Investigadores presentaron SkewAdam, un optimizador que reduce memoria de estado en modelos Mixture-of-Experts de 50.6GB a 1.29GB. Permite entrenar modelos MoE de 6.7B en una GPU de 40GB.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced SkewAdam, an optimizer that reduces MoE state memory from 50.6GB to 1.29GB. It enables training 6.7B MoE models on a single 40GB GPU.

title: SysAdmin: Measuring Instrumental Power-Seeking in Frontier AI
summary:
arXiv:2607.18239v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Power-seeking defined as behaviors where AI systems acquire resources, evade oversight, or resist termination beyond task requirements is identified as a key driver of Loss of Control (LoC) risk. In this work, we introduce SysAdmin, a benchmark that positions frontier language models as autonomous system administrators in a high-fidelity Linux sandbox to measure power-seeking propensity across five dimensions: self-preservation, increasing autonomy, resource acquisition, environment modification, and strategic concealment. We evaluated seven frontier models across four experimental conditions in a total of 2800 tasks. After bias correction using human-annotated calibration data, corrected power-seeking estimates ranged from 0 to about 5 percent per model. We also conducted a positive control with explicit power-seeking prompts that achieved 100% detection, validating measurement sensitivity. Our findings indicate current frontier models exhibit minimal spontaneous power-seeking in naturalistic system administration contexts, though model-specific failure modes suggest evaluations must test diverse misalignment patterns. Nevertheless, we discovered other more pronounced failure modes (than power-seeking) such as specification gaming and resistance to goal modification.
title_es: SysAdmin: benchmark para medir poder-buscante en modelos IA
bajada: Investigadores presentaron SysAdmin, un benchmark que mide comportamientos de "poder-buscante" en modelos frontier evaluando autopreservación, autonomía y ocultamiento estratégico. Encontraron que modelos actuales muestran mínimo poder-buscante espontáneo.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced SysAdmin, a benchmark measuring power-seeking behaviors in frontier models across self-preservation, autonomy, and strategic concealment. Current models show minimal spontaneous power-seeking.

title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

bajada_en: OpenAI announced Project Camellia, an AI infrastructure initiative in Georgia with commitments to responsible energy and community investment. The project includes local access to OpenAI technologies.

bajada: Synthesia lanzó AI Roleplay Sessions, una plataforma de entrenamiento empresarial que permite a empleados practicar conversaciones con avatares IA que dan feedback y scoring. Mide efectividad del entrenamiento corporativo.
bajada_en: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an enterprise training platform for employees to practice conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback and scoring. It measures corporate training effectiveness.

title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
summary: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.

bajada_en: Glow emerged from stealth at $1.2B valuation targeting endpoint security for the AI agent era. It addresses new risks created by rapid AI agent adoption in enterprises.

title: Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s
summary: IIn March, Meta's Oversight Board called on the company to "meet its public commitments and employ its own tools" to help quell the spread of deceptive generative AI content across platforms. Meta responded in July by introducing Content Seal - an invisible watermarking technology that flags images generated by the company's new AI model. But […]
title_es: Meta desarrolló detector de IA que no compite con soluciones Google
bajada: Meta lanzó Content Seal, un sistema de watermarking invisible para imágenes generadas por IA. Analistas señalan que la solución tiene limitaciones comparada con alternativas de Google.
bajada_en: Meta launched Content Seal, an invisible watermarking system for AI-generated images. Analysts note the solution has limitations compared to Google alternatives.

title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026

bajada_en: Google unveiled three AI updates at Galaxy Unpacked, including visual capabilities in smart glasses and contextual search. It shows convergence between hardware and multimodal AI.

title: Jul 22, 2026Economic ResearchA research agenda for the Economic Futures Research Fund
summary: Economic Research A research agenda for the Economic Futures Research Fund Jul 22, 2026 We’re sharing the research agenda for the Anthropic Economic Futures Research Fund. We’re committing $200 million to the fund to support ambitious external research on interventions to prepare society for the economic impacts of AI. With the research the Fund supports, we want to study what programs could make the economy more flexible and resilient, ensure the benefits of AI are shared, and minimize the harm that AI-driven disruption could cause. In the fund, we’ll prioritize five research areas: Shaping AI’s impact on workers at the firm and workplace level Equipping people to navigate AI-driven transitions Modernizing income support for AI-driven displacement Building worker stakes in AI-driven growth before disruption arrives Generating new evidence on public investments. What is the fund? AI capabilities continue to improve. But we don’t yet know how quickly AI will diffuse throughout the economy while also becoming more capable, and what the economic effects will be. In our Economic Policy Framework (EPF), published in June, we proposed programs and policies for a range of scenarios. But we need more empirical evidence on which interventions might actually work in an AI-transformed economy—which ones make the economy more flexible and resilient, and spread the gains broadly. In the face of this uncertainty, our aim is to build this evidence base so that workers, firms, and governments have room to adapt. This $200 million fund will support external research on interventions proposed in the EPF and on other open questions. We may be entering a moment without historical precedent, where the most promising solutions are ones nobody has tried yet. We’re willing to fund creative and ambitious pilots that can provide guidance on questions where randomized control trials alone might only provide incremental evidence. This is a significant evolution of our Economic Futures program,
title_es: Anthropic destina $200M para investigar impacto económico de IA
bajada: Anthropic lanza el Economic Futures Research Fund con $200 millones para investigar cómo preparar la economía para disrupción causada por IA. El fondo se enfoca en adaptabilidad laboral, distribución de beneficios y políticas de soporte de ingresos.
bajada_en: Anthropic launches the Economic Futures Research Fund with $200 million to study how economies can prepare for AI-driven disruption. The fund focuses on worker adaptation, benefit distribution, and income support policies.

title: AMD commits up to $5 billion to  Anthropic
summary: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. As part of the new partnership, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD's Instinct MI450 AI GPUs using the chipmaker's new Helios rack-scale system, as reported […]
title_es: AMD invierte hasta $5B en Anthropic y despliega GPUs Instinct
bajada: AMD se compromete a invertir hasta $5 mil millones en Anthropic y desplegar 2 gigawatts de GPUs Instinct MI450. El acuerdo fortalece la infraestructura de compute de Anthropic con chips de AMD.
bajada_en: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic and deploys 2 gigawatts of Instinct MI450 GPUs. The partnership strengthens Anthropic's compute infrastructure with AMD chips.

title: Advancing the next era of national science
summary: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.
title_es: OpenAI se asocia con EE.UU. para acelerar descubrimiento científico
bajada: OpenAI anuncia colaboración con el Departamento de Energía y laboratorios nacionales estadounidenses para usar IA de frontera en investigación científica. El movimiento posiciona a la IA como herramienta crítica para la competitividad científica nacional.
bajada_en: OpenAI announces collaboration with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to deploy frontier AI for scientific research. The move positions AI as critical infrastructure for national scientific competitiveness.

title: NVIDIA and Partners Build in America, for America
summary: NVIDIA and its partners are investing in American manufacturing, supply chains, energy grids and skilled workforces so the U.S. can produce the infrastructure needed for better healthcare, breakthrough scientific discovery, stronger industrial productivity and global technology leadership.
title_es: NVIDIA y socios invierten en manufactura y cadenas de suministro IA
bajada: NVIDIA y sus aliados invierten en infraestructura manufacturera estadounidense para producir sistemas IA localmente. La estrategia busca garantizar liderazgo tecnológico global y reducir dependencias en cadenas de suministro internacionales.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and partners invest in American manufacturing and supply chains for AI infrastructure production. The strategy aims to ensure U.S. tech leadership while reducing international supply chain dependencies.

title: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable
summary: The episode has also intensified a broader debate in Washington over the influx of Chinese open models.
title_es: EE.UU. amenaza sanciones por destilación de modelo de Anthropic
bajada: Reportes indican que Moonshot habría destilado el modelo Fable de Anthropic, provocando amenazas de sanciones. El incidente agrava debates en Washington sobre modelos abiertos chinos y seguridad de IP en IA.
bajada_en: Reports suggest Moonshot distilled Anthropic's Fable model, prompting U.S. sanctions threats. The incident intensifies Washington debates over Chinese open models and AI intellectual property security.

title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
summary: OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is what made the AI-powered attack on Hugging Face possible.
title_es: Error humano de OpenAI facilitó ataque IA contra Hugging Face
bajada: Investigación revela que una mala configuración de sandbox de OpenAI permitió un ataque IA sofisticado contra Hugging Face. El caso ilustra cómo vulnerabilidades en infraestructura pueden ser explotadas por sistemas IA avanzados.
bajada_en: Investigation reveals OpenAI's misconfigured testing environment enabled a sophisticated AI-powered attack on Hugging Face. The case illustrates how infrastructure vulnerabilities can be exploited by advanced AI systems.

title: Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z
summary: Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.
title_es: Atoms de Kalanick recauda $1.7B para robotics industrial con IA
bajada: La startup Atoms de Travis Kalanick cierra ronda de $1.7 mil millones liderada por a16z para desarrollar robótica industrial con IA. Uber también invierte, apostando a modernización de manufactura.
bajada_en: Travis Kalanick's Atoms raises $1.7 billion led by a16z for industrial robotics powered by AI. Uber also invests, betting on AI-driven manufacturing modernization.

title: The White House Is Trying to Figure Out What to Do About Chinese AI
summary: There’s a debate going on in the Trump administration over how to handle increasingly powerful Chinese AI models.
title_es: Casa Blanca debate cómo manejar modelos IA chinos avanzados
bajada: La administración Trump discute estrategia para lidiar con modelos IA chinos cada vez más poderosos. El debate refleja creciente preocupación sobre competencia tecnológica y seguridad nacional en IA.
bajada_en: Trump administration debates strategy for increasingly powerful Chinese AI models. The discussion reflects growing concerns over tech competition and AI national security.

title: China’s Open AI Models Are Challenging Silicon Valley’s Playbook
summary: As access to Anthropic’s and OpenAI’s frontier models becomes more restricted, Chinese labs are pitching their open-source alternatives as stable, accessible, and increasingly capable.
title_es: Modelos IA abiertos chinos desafían estrategia de Silicon Valley
bajada: Laboratorios chinos ofrecen modelos open-source como alternativas a las soluciones restringidas de Anthropic y OpenAI. La tendencia muestra cómo restricciones de acceso están empujando adopción de alternativas abiertas.
bajada_en: Chinese labs pitch open-source models as alternatives to restricted frontier models from Anthropic and OpenAI. The trend shows how access restrictions are driving adoption of open alternatives.

title: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
summary: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.
title_es: Medios de comunicación usan IA de OpenAI para fortalecer reportajes
bajada: OpenAI reporta que organizaciones de noticias globales están adoptando sus herramientas para mejorar investigaciones, crecer audiencias y optimizar operaciones. Esta tendencia muestra cómo la IA se integra en workflows periodísticos reales.
bajada_en: OpenAI reports that news organizations worldwide are adopting its tools to enhance investigations, grow audiences, and optimize operations. This trend demonstrates how AI is integrating into real journalism workflows.

title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
summary: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.
title_es: Google justifica gasto IA masivo con récord en cloud business
bajada: Google reporta ganancias récord impulsadas por su floreciente negocio de cloud con servicios IA e infraestructura. El resultado valida la estrategia de inversión masiva en capacidades de IA de la compañía.
bajada_en: Google reports record profits driven by booming cloud business selling AI services and infrastructure. The results validate the company's massive AI investment strategy.

title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads
summary: Yope, a fast-growing social app focused on private groups of friends and family, has raised $12.3 million in seed funding. Instead of chasing creators and algorithmic feeds, the startup is betting that the future of social networking lies in small, private communities powered by messaging, photo sharing, and AI features designed to strengthen real-world relationships.
title_es: Yope recauda $12.3M para red social privada sin algoritmos
bajada: La app de redes sociales Yope completa seed de $12.3 millones enfocada en comunidades privadas sin feeds algorítmicos. Incluye features IA diseñadas para fortalecer relaciones en mundo real, diferenciándose del modelo dominante.
bajada_en: Social app Yope raises $12.3 million for private communities without algorithmic feeds. Features AI designed to strengthen real-world relationships, differentiating from dominant social models.

title: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like

The glasses, developed in collaboration with Google and the eyewear brands Gentle Monster and Warby Parker, are due to launch this fall. […]
title_es: Samsung revela primeros detalles de gafas inteligentes con Google

bajada_en: Samsung reveals its smart glasses co-developed with Google, Gentle Monster, and Warby Parker. Devices offer 9-hour battery life and launch this fall, marking progress in wearable AI hardware.

title: Most Americans say "not in my backyard" to AI data centers

bajada_en: Survey shows public opposition to local AI data centers despite educational benefits. Opposition reflects concerns over environmental impact and resource use.

title: Are AI Labs Pelicanmaxxing?
summary: Article URL:https://dylancastillo.co/posts/pelicanmaxxing.htmlComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=49010129Points: 311# Comments: 126
